features.sample_action: create DS-RETROFIT-001 for a community-center retrofit choice
features.expected_result: a versioned packet containing all decision artifacts

features.sample_action: define the decision, scope, objectives, constraints, stakeholders, and deadline
add utility bills and an engineering assessment with relevance and confidence
compare no action, controls-only, and whole-building retrofit
features.expected_result: a scenario table with aligned measures

features.sample_action: record cost, emissions, comfort, disruption, and equity effects
review the claim that the project pays back in five years
features.expected_result: a supported, contested, or unresolved claim state

features.sample_action: compare capital, operating, lifecycle, and uncertainty considerations
record contractor delay, budget overrun, rollback, and recovery
features.expected_result: a risk register with owners and mitigations

features.sample_action: record 3% annual tariff growth with source and confidence

features.expected_result: a returned calculation artifact and receipt

features.sample_action: check evidence, privacy, unresolved issues, and approval requirements
assemble a board briefing from reviewed packet sections
prepare a redacted public decision summary
track six months of post-retrofit energy and comfort data
reopen the decision after grant or outcome changes
features.expected_result: a new review cycle preserving history

features.sample_action: expose an approved public packet summary
features.expected_result: a scoped privacy-aware JSON or embed
